segments.text: As a senior developer, you should know where to copy-paste from and when to do it.

segments.text: Okay, I'm not saying it sarcastically.

segments.text: And if you copy-paste and all, your time will be saved.

segments.video_title: Basic Structure of an HTML Website

segments.text: Now I will tell you about a technique by which you will be able to see whatever we develop on this website, on this mobile.

segments.video_title: Basic Structure of an HTML Website

segments.video_title: Basic Structure of an HTML Website
segments.text: Right-click, open terminal, and type IP config.

segments.video_title: Basic Structure of an HTML Website
segments.text: If you are on an older version, you can also open command prompt or PowerShell.

segments.video_title: Basic Structure of an HTML Website
segments.text: As soon as you type IP config and press enter, you will see the IPV4 address here: 192.168.1.199.

segments.video_title: Basic Structure of an HTML Website
segments.text: Now, this IP address that we got here, I will copy it.

segments.video_title: Basic Structure of an HTML Website
segments.text: So this is the IPV4 address, I will copy it.

segments.video_title: Basic Structure of an HTML Website
segments.text: And in my settings, I will write live preview.

segments.video_title: Basic Structure of an HTML Website
segments.text: This 'local IP host address to host your files on' that is written, in its place I will write my IP address.

segments.video_title: Basic Structure of an HTML Website
segments.text: And after doing this, I will restart my VS Code.

segments.video_title: Basic Structure of an HTML Website
segments.text: You will also need to ensure one more thing: that you go into your Wi-Fi settings and make your network a private network.

segments.video_title: Basic Structure of an HTML Website
segments.text: It shouldn't be a public network, it should be a private network.

segments.video_title: Basic Structure of an HTML Website
segments.text: Network and internet, Wi-Fi, whichever Wi-Fi you are connected to, make it a private network.

segments.video_title: Basic Structure of an HTML Website
segments.text: And now if you right-click and show preview, you will see your IP address here: /index.html.

segments.video_title: Basic Structure of an HTML Website

segments.video_title: Basic Structure of an HTML Website

segments.video_title: Basic Structure of an HTML Website
Basic Structure of an HTML Website

segments.video_title: Basic Structure of an HTML Website
segments.text: And here you can see, my website has been previewed on mobile.
